texto: I lived in my head most of the time— a lonely and messed up place —and suddenly there was a higher force called Allah I could lean on. A companion, who'd travel with me this road less trodden... My life. Islam means surrendering yourself to God.
explicacao: Citação de Fadia Faqir sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “I lived in my head most of the time— a lonely and messed up place —and suddenly there was a highe…” articula reflexao, islam, lived em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como viagem e termino.
